full_text:
Zhang Yin 張音
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yin (張音). Prepared Emperor Xian’s abdication to Cao Pi. Zhang Yin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
